case_title: CLAYTON, ALGERINE VS DALE`S AUTO SERVICE INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLAYTON, ALGERINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DALE`S AUTO SERVICE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING TO DALE'S AUTO SERVICE INC RETURNED UNCLAIMED. NO SUCH NUMBER.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DALE'S AUTO SEVICE INC. RETURNED NO SUCH NUMBER.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY DALE SINGH HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-21-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-05-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DALE`S AUTO SERVICE INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY CLAYTON, ALGERINE AS TO DEFENDANT DALE`S AUTO SERVICE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-16-1997 AS TO THIRD PARTY DALE SINGH
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-30-1997, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY DALE SINGH
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-15-1997, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DALE`S AUTO SERVICE INC.
POS AS TO DEFT DALE'S AUTO SERVICE INC, FOR NEW COURT DATE OF MAY 5, 1997 FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLAYTON, ALGERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DALE`S AUTO SERVICE INC. $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $415.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
